assertions.description: CSSFontFeatureValuesRule is exposed on the global object.
CSSFontFeatureValuesRule.prototype exposes a fontFamily property as described by the IDL.
An @font-feature-values block parses as a CSSFontFeatureValuesRule.
assertions.test: (()=>{const s=new CSSStyleSheet();s.replaceSync('@font-feature-values Test { @styleset { x: 1; } }');return s.cssRules[0] instanceof CSSFontFeatureValuesRule;})()

assertions.description: The fontFamily getter returns the family name parsed from @font-feature-values.
